title: Alert
description: The Alert component displays important messages to users. It supports different types (primary, success, warning, danger, secondary), can be closed manually or automatically, and allows for custom content, icons, and actions.

sections.title: Inline
sections.description: In inline mode, you can only use ax-title, ax-icon, ax-button, and ax-close-button tags.

sections.title: Auto timeout
sections.description: Auto-close the alert after a duration; shows progress bar and emits onClosed.

sections.title: Programmatic close
sections.description: Call close() via a template reference to remove the alert.

sections.title: Color variants
sections.description: Demonstrates default and themed colors and their icons.

sections.title: Custom icon
sections.description: Provide custom icon content to override the default icon logic.

sections.title: Block layout
sections.description: Using content and footer switches the layout from inline to block.

sections.title: Events
sections.description: Shows colorChange and inherited onOptionChanged in action.

sections.title: Long content & overflow
sections.description: Demonstrates wrapping and layout with long paragraphs and single-line overflow.

props.name: color
props.description: The color type of the alert (primary, success, warning, danger, secondary, default). Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: timeOut
props.description: Duration in milliseconds after which the alert will automatically close.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color of the alert changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: timeOutChange
events.description: Emitted when the timeOut value changes.

events.name: onClosed
events.description: Emitted when the alert is closed.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Removes the alert from the container after a transition effect.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The alert is removed from the DOM and the onClosed event is emitted.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void
